labels.analysis: The MCP Server "com.supplymaven/risk-intelligence" provides 7 tools focused on gaming tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading. Key tools: get_supply_chain_risk, get_pillar_scores, get_manufacturing_index, get_commodity_prices, get_port_congestion.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Gaming" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: score, sport.
labels.tool_verified_reason:
auth error in response: event: message
data: {"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"API key required. Get a free key i

tools.name: get_supply_chain_risk
tools.description: Get the Global Disruption Index (GDI) — a 0-100 composite score of supply chain risk. Higher = more risk.

tools.name: get_pillar_scores
tools.description: Get individual GDI pillar scores: Energy (25%), Materials (25%), Transportation (30%), Macro (20%). Paid tier only.

tools.name: get_manufacturing_index
tools.description: Get the Supply Maven Manufacturing Index (SMI) — a proprietary weather-adjusted electricity demand indicator. INVERTED scale: lower = stronger manufacturing. 0-35 STRONG, 36-50 NORMAL, 51-65 BELOW TREND, 66+ WEAK.

tools.name: get_commodity_prices
tools.description: Get latest commodity prices relevant to supply chain risk. Free tier: 5 key commodities. Paid: all tracked commodities.

tools.name: get_port_congestion
tools.description: Get port congestion data — vessel counts, congestion scores, and stationary vessel ratios for major global ports. Paid tier only.

tools.name: get_disruption_alerts
tools.description: Get recent supply chain disruption alerts from news intelligence. Free tier: CRITICAL severity only. Paid: all severities.

tools.name: get_sector_demand
tools.description: Get electricity sector demand breakdown (industrial vs commercial ratios) across 8 US grid regions. Reveals data center / AI growth contamination signals. Paid tier only.
